The Couple

Two Hearts, One Soul

Dr. Divya Samhita

MBBS · The Bride

A compassionate healer with a heart of gold — Divya brings grace, warmth, and luminous joy to every moment. Daughter of Dr. Singupuram Narayana Rao & Smt. Laxmi, Berhampur.

Krishna Vamsi

M.Tech (BITS Pilani) · The Groom

Thoughtful, driven, and devoted — Vamsi's love is as steady as the stars. Son of Smt. Bendalam Geetha W/o. (Late) Ravi Kumar, Visakhapatnam.

Together Forever

Sacred Traditions

❤️ Dressed in Sacred Tradition ❤️

🌺 🌸 🌼 🪷

With Blessings

A Beautiful Union

01

The Bride

Dr. Divya Samhita — a healer by heart and soul. Her compassion, grace, and radiant spirit make every life she touches brighter and better.

02

The Groom

Krishna Vamsi — thoughtful, brilliant, devoted. A man whose love is as deep as the ocean and whose dreams are as boundless as the infinite sky.

03

Two Families

The Bendalam family of Visakhapatnam & the Singupuram family of Berhampur — united in joy, blessed by elders, celebrated by all.

04

A New Beginning

As the auspicious Vruschika Lagnam graces the evening of May 10th, a lifetime of laughter, love, and togetherness begins anew.
